signals.raw:
GOP Midterm Warnings Escalate** | YES | MED[4]  
Top **Republicans** admit private polling shows risks of losing **House** and **Senate** majorities in **midterms**, despite Senate GOP optimism for expansion to 54-55 seats.[3][4] **Vance** campaigns aggressively as RNC finance chair to build alliances.[2][3]

signals.headline: XRP Tops ETF Inflows Amid BTC/ETH Outflows (April 12)** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
XRP Tops ETF Inflows Amid BTC/ETH Outflows (April 12)** | YES | MED  
XRP ETFs recorded $3.3M net inflows on April 12, 2026, while Bitcoin ETFs saw $159M outflows and Ethereum $64M, signaling short-term institutional rotation to XRP as a neutral asset—potentially moving prediction markets on XRP resilience[1].

signals.headline: XRP Gains Full Commodity Classification from SEC/CFTC** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
XRP Gains Full Commodity Classification from SEC/CFTC** | YES | HIGH  
XRP achieved full commodity status from both regulators, boosting ETF cumulative inflows to $1.21B and setting up bullish demand ahead of late-April CLARITY Act markup for broader institutional entry[3].
